description: D-026 Phase 1B-3 启动前置条件：Customer >= 5 MIGRATABLE / Project >= 5 MIGRATABLE / Model >= 10 MIGRATABLE / Makeup >= 10 MIGRATABLE. Migration pilot MUST NOT start until ALL thresholds are met.
judgement: FAIL — One or more D-026 quantity thresholds not met. MIGRATION_PILOT_001 MUST NOT start. Review NEEDS_REVIEW / BLOCKED records and apply remediation (D-022 duplicate resolution, D-023 orphan handling, status / source / budget / project_type mapping).
